versions.version_description: A lot of versions of this song already, and I didn't want to clutter the database with another version, but I think this version was worth making because it's quite accurate to the recording. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HaMq2nn5ac0.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Yes, I do, I believe[/tab]

 That one day I will be where I was

 Right there, right next to you
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
 And it's hard, the days just seem so dark[/tab]

 The moon, the stars are nothing without you
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
 Your touch, your skin,[/tab]

 Where do I begin?

 No words can explain the way I'm missing you
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
 Deny this emptiness, this hole that I'm inside[/tab]

 These tears, they tell their own story


[Pre-Chorus] 

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
 You told me not to cry when you were gone[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Bsus4[/ch]          [ch]B7sus4[/ch] 
 But the feeling's overwhelming, it's much too strong[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]Dbmin7[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]  
 Can I lay by your side, next to you, you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]C#min7[/ch]
 And make sure you're alright?[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
 I'll take care of you,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bsus4[/ch]                 [ch]B7sus4[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
 And I don't want to be here if I can't be with you tonight[/tab]

(Strum each chord repeatedly on the beat)


[Verse 2]

[tab]      [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
 I'm reaching out to you[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Esus4[/ch]
 Can you hear my call?[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
 This hurt that I've been through[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Esus4[/ch]
 I'm missing you, missing you like crazy[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]C#m7[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
 You told me not to cry when you were gone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Bsus4[/ch]          [ch]B7sus4[/ch] 
 But the feeling's overwhelming, it's much too strong[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]C#min7[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
 Can I lay by your side, next to you, you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]C#min7[/ch]
 And make sure you're alright?[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
 I'll take care of you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bsus4[/ch]               [ch]B7sus4[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
 And I don't wanna be here if I can't be with you tonight[/tab]


[Instrumental]

  [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]
 Lay me down tonight,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]
lay me by your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]
 Lay me down tonight, [/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]B7[/ch]
lay me by your side[/tab]

(Strum each chord once)

[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]Dbm7[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]Bsus4[/ch]       [ch]B7sus4[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Can I lay by your side, next to you, you [/tab]
